title: Creamy Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
description: A quick and elegant pasta dish with plump shrimp in a silky lemon-garlic cream sauce. The sauce and pasta cook simultaneously for a weeknight-friendly meal that feels like a restaurant showstopper.
instructions: Cook pasta in a large pot of salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of cooking water before draining.
Melt 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook shrimp in batches until golden and opaque. Season to taste, remove from pan, and set aside.
Add remaining butter and garlic to the pan. Cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in cream and lemon juice (start with 2 tbsp). Add parsley and season to taste. Simmer until the sauce coats the back of a spoon.
Return shrimp to the sauce and adjust seasoning.
Add drained pasta and a splash of reserved cooking water. Toss until the pasta is evenly coated in the sauce.
Serve with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
